pending.body:
finding_summary: The legacy fallback for planning/plan-and-implement scope guidance can splice `## Scope Guidance` into the middle of `{{project_prompt}}` instead of before the stage schema. `inject_scope_guidance()` searches the fully rendered prompt for the first `\n## Authoritative JSON Schema` and inserts there (src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:209-224). A bead prompt can legitimately contain that same heading inside `AGENTS / Repo Guidance`, because `render_bead_task_prompt()` only escapes canonical contract headings and leaves other `## ...` headings untouched (src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:769-798). On a supported legacy override that omits `{{classification_guidance}}`, this corrupts the prompt structure and weakens the new scope-boundary instructions.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs
- src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs
remediation_hint: Inject relative to template structure instead of searching the rendered prompt text, or at minimum make the fallback target the final schema section unambiguously and add a regression test with `## Authoritative JSON Schema` inside repo guidance.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 5 -> Plan and Implement
